liner: Welcome to a surreal, narcotic exploration of insomnia where the narrator refuses rescue, choosing instead to dissolve into a hypnotic loop of dissociation. This dark melodic trap track floats at 123 BPM over eerie soul chords and ghostly vocal chops, creating an immersive late-night atmosphere. Experience heavy 808 basslines that shake the floor while airy female R&B harmonies layer against high-pitched male chants. The journey moves from desperate entreaty to fractured denial, capturing chronic pain and nightmare fuel in every sparse verse. As the beat drops, feel the collapse of reality under a glowing bottle by your bed. This is not about getting better; it's about staying lost just one more night.

bios.lead: Keeps sorrow pounding. Never misses a chant.
bios.back: Sinks deep into silence. Lets go without speaking.
bios.drums: Triggers heavy beats. Keeps the floor shaking.
bios.perc: Adds ghostly chops. Textures the night.
bios.bass: Drives the low end. Heavy and relentless.
bios.synth: Weaves eerie chords. Sets the surreal mood.
bios.other: Pads the space. Adds warped reality.
